code:
value Account
  balance: Int
end

fn deposit(_ acc: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Account
  Account(balance: acc.balance + amount)
end

fn withdraw(_ acc: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Result<Account, String>
  if amount > acc.balance
    Err("overdraft")
  else
    Ok(Account(balance: acc.balance - amount))
  end
end

mut acc = Account(balance: 100)
mut last_status = "ok"

acc = deposit(acc, 50)
last_status = "ok"

match withdraw(acc, 30)
when Ok(next)
  acc = next
  last_status = "ok"
when Err(_)
  last_status = "overdraft"
end

match withdraw(acc, 500)
when Ok(next)
  acc = next
  last_status = "ok"
when Err(_)
  last_status = "overdraft"
end

println("final_balance=#{acc.balance}")
println("last_status=#{last_status}")
